controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called as the master direction - reserve bank of india (repurchase transactions (repo)) directions, 2025 and shall supersede all other directions i
controls.control_description:
Short title, commencement and applicability of the directions
(1) These Directions shall be called as the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Repurchase Transactions (Repo)) Directions, 2025 and shall supersede all other
directions issued on the subject and covered by these regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called as the master direction - reserve bank of india (repurchase transactions (repo)) directions, 2025 and shall supersede all other directions i

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions
shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to repurchase transactions (repo), undertaken on recognized stock exchanges, electronic trading platforms (etp) and over-the-counter (ot
controls.control_description:
(2) These Directions shall be applicable to repurchase transactions (Repo),
undertaken on recognized stock exchanges, electronic trading platforms (ETP) and
Over-the-Counter (OTC) to the extent stated herein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to repurchase transactions (repo), undertaken on recognized stock exchanges, electronic trading platforms (etp) and over-the-counter (ot

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the rules and regulations issued by the recognized stock exchange/securities and exchange board of india (sebi)
controls.control_description:
In case of exchange traded
repurchase transactions (Repo), procedure for execution and settlement of trades
shall be in accordance with the rules and regulations issued by the recognized stock
exchange/Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with the rules and regulations issued by the recognized stock exchange/securities and exchange board of india (sebi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to repo/ reverse repo transactions under the liquidity adjustment facility and the marginal standing facility, which would continue to be regula
controls.control_description:
(3) These Directions shall not apply to repo/ reverse repo transactions under the
Liquidity Adjustment Facility and the Marginal Standing Facility, which would
continue to be regulated as per the existing regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to repo/ reverse repo transactions under the liquidity adjustment facility and the marginal standing facility, which would continue to be regula

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank, security receipts and securitized debt instruments
controls.control_description:
(ii) bonds (iii) commercial papers (iv) certificate of deposits and such other securities
of a company, a multilateral financial institution (MFI) or a body corporate constituted
by or under a Central Act or a State Act, whether constituting a charge on the assets
of the company or body corporate or not, but does not include debt securities issued
by Central Government or a State Government, or such other persons as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank, security receipts and securitized debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank, security receipts and securitized debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be between seven days to one year
controls.control_description:
The original tenor of a CP shall be between seven
days to one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be between seven days to one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
(f) "Government securities" shall have the same meaning as defined in Section
2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company or firm whose shares and (or) debt are listed and traded on a recognized stock exchange/s
controls.control_description:
(h) "Listed corporate" means a company or firm whose shares and (or) debt are
listed and traded on a recognized stock exchange/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company or firm whose shares and (or) debt are listed and traded on a recognized stock exchange/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in the securities and exchange board of india act, 1992 (15 of 1992) or the rules or regulations made thereund
controls.control_description:
(j) "Municipal Debt Securities" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in
the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992 (15 of 1992) or the rules or
regulations made thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in the securities and exchange board of india act, 1992 (15 of 1992) or the rules or regulations made thereund

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2 (f) of securities contracts (regulation) act, 1956 (42 of 1956)
controls.control_description:
(k) "Recognized stock exchange" shall have the same meaning as defined in
Section 2 (f) of Securities Contracts (Regulation) Act, 1956 (42 of 1956).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2 (f) of securities contracts (regulation) act, 1956 (42 of 1956)

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person, other than an individual or huf, whose business activities are being regulated by any one of the financial regulators in india viz
controls.control_description:
(l) "Regulated entity" means any person, other than an individual or HUF, whose
business activities are being regulated by any one of the financial regulators in India
viz., Reserve Bank of India, Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI),
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI), Pension Fund
Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA), National Housing Bank (NHB) and
National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person, other than an individual or huf, whose business activities are being regulated by any one of the financial regulators in india viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure any company or firm which is (i) a holding, subsidiary or an associate company of such company
controls.control_description:
(m) "Related entity" of a company or a firm means any company or firm which is (i)
a holding, subsidiary or an associate company of such company;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any company or firm which is (i) a holding, subsidiary or an associate company of such company

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
The holding, subsidiary and
associate company shall have the same meaning as defined in Companies Act,
2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 45u (c) of rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(n) "Repo" shall have the same meaning as defined in Section 45U (c) of RBI Act,
1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 45u (c) of rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 45u (d) of rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
"Reverse Repo" shall have the same meaning as defined in Section 45U (d) of RBI
Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 45u (d) of rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description:
Eligible securities for repo
(1) The securities eligible for repo under these Directions shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure borrow against the collateral of its own securities, or securities issued by a related entity
controls.control_description:
(b) Listed corporate bonds and debentures, subject to the condition that no
participant shall borrow against the collateral of its own securities, or securities
issued by a related entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to borrow against the collateral of its own securities, or securities issued by a related entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified in this behalf by the central government
controls.control_description:
(f) Any other security of a local authority as may be specified in this behalf by the
Central Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified in this behalf by the central government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken for a minimum period of one day and a maximum period of one year
controls.control_description:
Tenor
Repos shall be undertaken for a minimum period of one day and a maximum period
of one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken for a minimum period of one day and a maximum period of one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be traded on any recognized stock exchanges, or an electronic trading platform (etp) duly authorised by the reserve bank or in the over- the-counter (
controls.control_description:
Trading venues
Repo transactions may be traded on any recognized stock exchanges, or an
electronic trading platform (ETP) duly authorised by the Reserve Bank or in the over-
the-counter (OTC) market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be traded on any recognized stock exchanges, or an electronic trading platform (etp) duly authorised by the reserve bank or in the over- the-counter (

controls.control_objective: To ensure use any mutually agreed trading process, including but not limited to, bilateral or multilateral, quote driven or order driven processes, anonymous or
controls.control_description:
Trading process
Repo transactions, including tri-party repo transactions, may use any mutually
agreed trading process, including but not limited to, bilateral or multilateral, quote
driven or order driven processes, anonymous or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use any mutually agreed trading process, including but not limited to, bilateral or multilateral, quote driven or order driven processes, anonymous or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported within 15 minutes of the trade: repo in government securities to the clearcorp repo order matching system (croms) and repo in other eligib
controls.control_description:
Reporting of trades
(1) All repo transactions, other than those on recognized stock exchanges or on
approved electronic trading platforms, that disseminate trade information on the
platforms, shall be reported within 15 minutes of the trade: repo in Government
securities to the Clearcorp Repo Order Matching System (CROMS) and repo in other
eligible securities to the reporting platform F-TRAC, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported within 15 minutes of the trade: repo in government securities to the clearcorp repo order matching system (croms) and repo in other eligib

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide any data or other information to the reserve bank or to any entity as may be required by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(2) All trading and reporting platforms, including recognized stock exchanges, for
repo transactions shall provide any data or other information to the Reserve Bank or
to any entity as may be required by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide any data or other information to the reserve bank or to any entity as may be required by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish any information or data sought by the reserve bank within the period stipulated in the letter/mail issued to the participant to furnish such i
controls.control_description:
(3) The participants to repo transactions acting under these Directions shall furnish
any information or data sought by the Reserve Bank within the period stipulated in
the letter/mail issued to the participant to furnish such information or data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish any information or data sought by the reserve bank within the period stipulated in the letter/mail issued to the participant to furnish such i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be-
controls.control_description:
Settlement of trades
(1) Settlement of trades under these Directions shall be-
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be-

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle either on a t+0 or t+1 basis
controls.control_description: (a) The first leg of all repo transactions shall settle either on a T+0 or T+1 basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle either on a t+0 or t+1 basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle on a delivery vs payments (dvp) basis
controls.control_description: (b) All repo transactions shall settle on a Delivery vs Payments (DvP) basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle on a delivery vs payments (dvp) basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle through ccil or any other clearing agency approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(c) All repos in government securities shall settle through CCIL or any other clearing
agency approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle through ccil or any other clearing agency approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle through the clearing house of exchanges or any other entity which has been approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(d) All repos in other eligible securities shall settle through the clearing house of
exchanges or any other entity which has been approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle through the clearing house of exchanges or any other entity which has been approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be-
controls.control_description:
Sale and substitution of repoed security
(1) Securities purchased under repo may be-
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be-

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken only by such entities that are eligible to undertake short sale transactions in terms of the relevant directions of the reserve bank and
controls.control_description:
Outright sale of securities acquired under repo shall be undertaken only by such
entities that are eligible to undertake short sale transactions in terms of the relevant
directions of the Reserve Bank and in such securities that are permitted to be short
sold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken only by such entities that are eligible to undertake short sale transactions in terms of the relevant directions of the reserve bank and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be priced transparently at prevailing market prices, in the first leg of a repo
controls.control_description:
(a) Collaterals shall be priced transparently at prevailing market prices, in the first leg
of a repo.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be priced transparently at prevailing market prices, in the first leg of a repo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be bilaterally agreed upon, in terms of the documentation governing repo transactions
controls.control_description:
(c) Haircut/ margins will be decided either by the clearing house or may be bilaterally
agreed upon, in terms of the documentation governing repo transactions, subject to
the following stipulations:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be bilaterally agreed upon, in terms of the documentation governing repo transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry a minimum haircut of 2% of market value
controls.control_description:
Listed corporate bonds and debentures shall carry a minimum haircut of 2% of
market value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry a minimum haircut of 2% of market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged based on tenor and illiquidity of the security
controls.control_description:
Additional haircut may be charged based on tenor and illiquidity
of the security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged based on tenor and illiquidity of the security

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry a minimum haircut of 1
controls.control_description: CPs and CDs shall carry a minimum haircut of 1.5% of market value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry a minimum haircut of 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry a minimum haircut of 2% of market value
controls.control_description:
Securities issued by a local authority shall carry a minimum haircut of 2% of
market value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry a minimum haircut of 2% of market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted by entities regulated by the reserve bank as per guidelines contained in annex ii
controls.control_description:
Accounting, presentation, valuation and disclosure
(1) Repos shall be accounted by entities regulated by the Reserve Bank as per
guidelines contained in Annex II.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be accounted by entities regulated by the reserve bank as per guidelines contained in annex ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure account for repo transactions as per applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
(2) Other eligible participants may account for repo transactions as per applicable
accounting standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account for repo transactions as per applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from crr/slr computation and the security acquired under repo shall be eligible for slr provided the security is primarily eligible for sl
controls.control_description:
Computation of Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) /Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR)
and borrowing limit
(1) Funds borrowed under repo including tri-party repo in government securities shall
be exempted from CRR/SLR computation and the security acquired under repo shall
be eligible for SLR provided the security is primarily eligible for SLR as per the
provisions of the Act under which it is required to be maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from crr/slr computation and the security acquired under repo shall be eligible for slr provided the security is primarily eligible for sl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as liabilities for cash reserve ratio/ statutory liquidity ratio requirement and, to the extent these liabilities are to the banking syste
controls.control_description:
(2) Borrowings by a bank through repo in corporate bonds and debentures shall be
reckoned as liabilities for Cash Reserve Ratio/ Statutory Liquidity Ratio requirement
and, to the extent these liabilities are to the banking system, they shall be netted as
per section 42(1) of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as liabilities for cash reserve ratio/ statutory liquidity ratio requirement and, to the extent these liabilities are to the banking syste

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into standard bilateral master repo agreements as per the documentation finalized by fimmda
controls.control_description:
Documentation
(1) Participants shall enter into standard bilateral master repo agreements as per the
documentation finalized by FIMMDA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into standard bilateral master repo agreements as per the documentation finalized by fimmda

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the rules and regulations of the platform where it is traded
controls.control_description:
(2) Repo transactions traded on a multilateral trading platform shall be governed by
the rules and regulations of the platform where it is traded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the rules and regulations of the platform where it is traded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be executed as per the documentation prescribed by the tri-party agent
controls.control_description:
(3) In case of tri-party repos, separate agreements between a participant and a tri-
party agent shall be executed as per the documentation prescribed by the tri-party
agent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be executed as per the documentation prescribed by the tri-party agent

controls.control_objective: To ensure 11, 2005
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 11, 2005

controls.control_objective: To ensure 30, 2011
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 30, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure 14, 2015
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 14, 2015

controls.control_objective: To ensure 14, 2015
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 14, 2015
